## 🚀 Type of Change
Please delete options that are not relevant.

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Configuration change (updates to JSON schema or configuration options)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Code refactoring
- [ ] Dependency update

## ✅ Checklist
Please check all that apply:

### Code Quality
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation

### Testing
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have tested my changes with realistic data volumes

### Configuration
- [ ] I have updated JSON schema if configuration changes were made
- [ ] I have provided example configurations for new features
- [ ] I have documented any breaking configuration changes
- [ ] I have tested configuration validation

### Documentation
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation
- [ ] I have added/updated inline code comments
- [ ] I have updated configuration examples if needed

### Security & Performance
- [ ] My changes don't introduce security vulnerabilities
- [ ] My changes don't negatively impact performance
- [ ] I have considered the impact on data privacy
